name: Kuro Coffee Table
subtitle: Solid Black Walnut
description: A study in negative space. The Kuro table's elliptical top appears to float above its hand-forged steel base. The black walnut surface is finished with a single coat of Danish hardwax oil, revealing the wood's natural figure without sealing out the character that develops over years of daily life.
care: Wipe with a slightly damp cloth, then immediately dry. Apply hardwax oil annually to maintain the finish. Avoid prolonged exposure to direct sunlight and liquids.
shipping: White-glove delivery with assembly included. Protective wrapping and custom crating.
metaDescription: Kuro Coffee Table in solid black walnut on a hand-forged steel base. Crafted in Portugal. From $1,240 — BeautyHome by NODO Studio.
altText: Kuro coffee table with floating elliptical black walnut top on a minimal blackened steel base
